description_long: This lounge set consists of three distinct pieces: a large light gray sofa, a dark gray sofa, and a single maroon armchair. The sofas feature a boxy, modern silhouette with deep seats, high backs, and low, straight armrests, each adorned with multiple loose cushions in complementary colors. The upholstery on the sofas and chair is tufted, giving a plush, textured appearance, while the cushions add both comfort and visual contrast. The legs are short, tapered, and appear to be made of wood, providing a subtle elevation and a mid-century modern touch. The overall design is cohesive yet varied, with each piece maintaining a consistent style but differing in color and size. This lounge set would be suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or upscale outdoor lounges.
description: A modern lounge set with a light gray sofa, a dark gray sofa, and a maroon armchair, all featuring tufted upholstery, loose cushions, and short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the dark gray sofa, the side of the light gray sofa, and the maroon armchair angled toward the viewer.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backs of the light gray sofa and maroon armchair, with the side of the dark gray sofa visible.
description_view_2: Back view of the dark gray sofa, side view of the light gray sofa, and the maroon armchair facing away.
description_view_3: Front view of the light gray sofa, side of the dark gray sofa, and the back of the maroon armchair.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each sofa has two large seat cushions and two or three loose back cushions, with additional smaller accent cushions; the armchair has a single seat and back cushion, all cushions are loose and varied in size.
attribute_backrest_design: High, straight backrests with deep tufting and a plush, padded structure; the backrests are continuous and slightly reclined for comfort.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present on both sofas, straight and low-profile, padded and integrated into the sofa frame; absent on the armchair.
attribute_leg_style: Short, tapered wooden legs with a slight outward angle, medium thickness, and a natural wood finish.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Tufted upholstery with a diamond pattern on the sofas and armchair, solid color fabric with visible stitching and plush texture.
